hr.meni_veggie_desc: Brioche pecivo, Garden Gourmet veggie pljeskavica 113g, iceberg salata, rajčica, luk, karamelizirani luk, guacamole krema, BBQ umak
hr.meni_limac_desc: Mali Klasik je Klasik burger, Pommes Frites ladice, bijeli ili BBQ umak
hr.meni_crunchy_desc: Brioche pecivo, hrskavi pileći stripesi, Provolone sir, rikula, iceberg salata, rajčica, sriracha mayo, slatko kiseli umak
hr.meni_nuggets_desc: Pileći medaljoni 10 komada, 2 umaka po izboru
hr.meni_philly_desc: Odležani Rib Eye steak 180g, Brioche pecivo, umak od topljenog cheddar sira, karamelizirani luk, bijeli umak
hr.meni_tortilja_desc: Marinirana piletina u tortilji 150g, dimljeni Provolone sir, rajčica, paprika, luk, guacamole krema, zelena salata, meksički mix, kiseli krastavci
hr.meni_pileca_salata_desc: Marinirana piletina 150g, iceberg salata, rajčica, bijelo zelje, paprika, luk, orašasti plodovi, sušeno voće, guacamole krema
hr.meni_ribeye_salata_desc: Marinirana piletina 150g, iceberg salata, rajčica, bijelo zelje, paprika, luk, orašasti plodovi, sušeno voće, guacamole krema
hr.meni_krumpiri_tartuf_desc: Hrskave kriške krumpira, sir s tartufima, krema od tartufa, ulje s tartufima, ribani crni tartuf
hr.meni_topljeni_sir_desc: Kriške krumpira 300g, dimljeni Provolone sir, topljeni sir Cheddar, začini
hr.meni_palacinka_desc: Punjene pržene palačinke sa jabukama i cimetom, preljevom od čokolade ili šumskog voća, šlag
hr.meni_fritule_desc: Hrskave fritule 150g s preljevom od pistacije, karamele ili Nutelle
hr.meni_alergen_7: 7 - Lupine i proizvodi od lupine (uključujući laktozu)
hr.meni_alergen_13: 13 - Sjeme sezama i proizvodi od sezama
hr.meni_alergeni_note: Alergeni označeni brojevima u zagradama. Pitajte osoblje za više informacija.
hr.index_catering_text: U ponudi imamo burger slider catering, savršen izbor ako želiš urban i originalan catering i prepoznatljivu Mrav kvalitetu u manjoj - slider verziji. Planiraš proslavu? Naši restorani dostupni su za najam, uz kompletnu catering uslugu i mogućnost odabira prilagođenog menija.
hr.index_showcase_desc: Naši burgeri rade se u svježem brioche pecivu uz pažljivo odabrano hrvatsko povrće za salatu.
hr.index_nudimo_text: Originalni i klasični burgeri, sočni cheesesteakovi, prefine tortilje i prezdrave salate te čak 6 vrsta točenih craft piva pivovare Zeppelin! Zaviri u naš meni i posjeti nas na dvije lokacije u Novom Zagrebu ili naruči putem Wolt platforme!
hr.index_newsletter_text: Prijavite se za novosti i posebne ponude
hr.onama_intro_text: Od trenutka kada smo 2020. otvorili prvi lokal u pročelju Paviljona 12 Zagrebačkog Velesajma pa sve do danas, kada Burger & Beer Bar Mrav broji dva lokala s jasnim planom širenja na nove lokacije u Zagrebu i okolici, naša filozofija ostaje ista: najbolji i najsvježiji sastojci, originalna receptura i vrhunska usluga. Kao istinski zaljubljenici u burgere, nikada nismo željeli biti samo još jedno mjesto na karti. Od prvog dana vodila nas je jednostavna, ali ambiciozna ideja – podići prosječan burger na višu razinu i dati mu pažnju kakvu inače imaju fine dining jela.
hr.onama_s1_title: Dobar burger nije samo brza hrana
hr.onama_s1_text: Dobar burger je puno više. On je rezultat promišljenih i originalnih recepata i uistinu najkvalitetnijih sastojaka dostupnih na tržištu. Pljeskavice napravljene od miksa chucka i flanka 100% domaće junetine uzgojene na hrvatskim pašnjacima dolaze od naših prijatelja iz mesnice Martinjak, dok svježa brioche peciva stižu iz pekarnice Miško. Kompromise ne trpimo, a rezultat kojem težimo je smješak na licu svakog gosta (uz poneku mrlju od umaka na licu).
hr.onama_quote: "Fokus nam je na svježoj pripremi, izdašnim porcijama i jasnim okusima koji dolaze iz kvalitetnih sastojaka."
hr.onama_s2_text: Najbolji prijatelj dobrog burgera je dobro pivo. U Mravu u ponudi imamo preko deset vrsta piva, od toga čak šest neodiljivih kraftica bjelovarske pivovare Zeppelin. Svježa, kvalitetna i punog okusa, Zeppelin piva nastaju s ljubavlju prema tradicionalnom i inovativnom pivarstvu. Svako pivo proizvedeno je od pažljivo odabranih sastojaka, bez kompromisa što čini savršenu kombinaciju s našim jelovnikom. Od klasičnih lagera do modernih IPA i sezonskih izdanja - Zeppelin craft piva donose užitak svakim gutljajem. Slobodno se zarundaj, nećemo nikome reći…
hr.catering_intro_title: Zaboravi na standardne plate, suhe kanapee i već viđene domjenke.
hr.catering_intro_text: Mrav slider catering donosi ti mini burgere i tortilje izrađene od vrhunskih sastojaka, servirane u opuštenom street food izdanju. Svaki slider priprema se s istom pažnjom kao i naši signature burgeri – bez kompromisa, bez prečaca, samo konkretni okusi i prepoznatljiva Mrav kvaliteta. Naš slider catering savršen je za poslovne domjenke, privatne proslave, krstitke, rođendane i sva okupljanja na kojima želiš ležernu atmosferu, ali i konkretan gastro doživljaj o kojem će se pričati i nakon zadnjeg zalogaja.
hr.catering_feat1_desc: Mini verzije tvojih najdražih jela iz Mrava, prilagođene street food načinu serviranja
hr.catering_feat2_desc: Ljubazno i spretno osoblje pobrinuti će se da sve prođe u najboljem redu
hr.catering_feat3_desc: Catering dostavljamo i postavljamo bilo gdje u Zagrebu i okolici, po dogovoru
hr.catering_feat4_desc: Želiš da tvojim gostima serviramo piće? Treba ti i torta? Nema problema, sve može!
hr.catering_truck_text: Imaš velik broj gostiju i želiš da im hranu pripremamo na licu mjesta? I za to imamo rješenje! Naš food truck na kotačima spreman je bilo koju lokaciju pretvoriti u pravi festival na otvorenom! Uživaj u standardnoj ponudi Mrav burgera i tortilja ili dogovori prilagođeni meni.
hr.catering_cta_text: Pošalji nam upit i brzo ćemo ti se javiti s dodatnim informacijama i informativnom ponudom.

en.meni_alergeni_note: Allergens marked with numbers in brackets. Ask staff for more information.
en.index_catering_text: We offer burger slider catering — the perfect choice if you're looking for an urban, original catering experience with the signature Mrav quality in a smaller, slider version. Planning a celebration? Our restaurants are available for private rental, with full catering service and the option to create a customized menu.
en.index_showcase_desc: Our burgers are served in fresh brioche buns with carefully selected Croatian vegetables.
en.index_nudimo_text: Original and classic burgers, juicy cheesesteaks, delicious tortillas, and fresh, healthy salads — plus 6 types of craft draft beer from Zeppelin Brewery! Take a look at our menu and visit us at our two locations in Novi Zagreb, or order via the Wolt platform.
en.index_newsletter_text: Sign up for news and special offers
en.onama_intro_text: From the moment we opened our first location in 2020, at the front of Pavilion 12 at the Zagreb Fair, until today — with two locations and a clear plan to expand across Zagreb and beyond — our philosophy has remained the same: the best and freshest ingredients, original recipes, and top-quality service. As true burger enthusiasts, we never wanted to be just another place on the map. From day one, we were driven by a simple yet ambitious idea — to elevate the average burger and give it the same level of attention usually reserved for fine dining dishes.
en.onama_s1_title: A great burger is not just fast food
en.onama_s1_text: A great burger is much more than that. It's the result of carefully crafted, original recipes and truly high-quality ingredients. Our patties are made from a blend of chuck and flank cuts of 100% locally sourced Croatian beef, raised on domestic pastures and supplied by our partners at Martinjak Butchery. Fresh brioche buns are delivered from Miško Bakery. We don't believe in compromises — and the result we aim for is a smile on every guest's face (along with a bit of sauce on it).
en.onama_quote: "Our focus is on fresh preparation, generous portions, and bold flavors that come from quality ingredients."
en.onama_s2_title: A burger without craft beer isn't a burger!
en.onama_s2_text: The best friend of a great burger is great beer. At Mrav, we offer more than ten types of beer, including six outstanding craft options from the Bjelovar-based Zeppelin Brewery. Fresh, full of flavor, and brewed with passion for both traditional and modern brewing techniques, Zeppelin beers are made from carefully selected ingredients — without compromise — making them the perfect match for our menu. From classic lagers to modern IPAs and seasonal releases, Zeppelin craft beers deliver enjoyment with every sip. Go ahead, treat yourself — we won't tell anyone…
en.catering_intro_title: Forget standard platters, dry canapes, and predictable catering setups.
en.catering_intro_text: Mrav slider catering brings you mini burgers and tortillas made from premium ingredients, served in a relaxed street food style. Every slider is prepared with the same level of care as our signature burgers — no compromises, no shortcuts, just bold flavors and the recognizable Mrav quality. Our slider catering is perfect for corporate events, private parties, christenings, birthdays, and any gathering where you want a laid-back atmosphere paired with a memorable food experience your guests will talk about long after the last bite.
en.catering_feat1_desc: Mini versions of your favorite Mrav dishes, adapted to a street food serving style
en.catering_feat2_desc: Friendly and efficient staff will make sure everything runs smoothly
en.catering_feat3_desc: We deliver and set up catering anywhere in Zagreb and the surrounding area, by arrangement
en.catering_feat4_desc: Want us to serve drinks as well? Need a cake? No problem — we've got you covered!
en.catering_truck_text: Expecting a large number of guests and want food prepared on-site? We've got a solution for that too! Our food truck on wheels is ready to turn any location into a true open-air festival. Enjoy our standard selection of Mrav burgers and tortillas, or arrange a customized menu.
en.catering_cta_text: Send us your inquiry and we'll get back to you quickly with additional information and a preliminary offer.
